description: Style Note Luxurious comfort is teamed with style in these pair of brown shoes from gliders. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style. Product Details Round blunt toed brown slip on shoes Soft fabric upper, has reinforced overlay at the heel collar, elasticated gussets at the sides of the tongue and a decorative tape around the shoe and tongue Soft footbed Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with horizontal grooves, branding under the toe region and suction point at the heel Comes with a shoe bag Material and Care Fabric Wipe with a clean damp cloth when required
